news.title: West Asia conflict ‘systemic tremor’, moving from shocks to permanent volatility: Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman
news.india_relevance: The Finance Minister provides a macro-policy framework for how India is navigating the prolonged geopolitical instability in the Middle East.
news.why_it_matters: It signals a shift in India's fiscal and monetary planning from treating the war as a temporary disruption to a permanent structural risk.

news.title: RBI proposes structured Business Correspondent model, formalises fixed outlets, pay structure, tighter oversight
news.india_relevance: This policy directly impacts financial inclusion and the last-mile banking infrastructure that serves millions of rural Indians.
news.why_it_matters: By formalizing pay and oversight, the RBI aims to stabilize the gig-style banking workforce and reduce systemic fraud in rural banking.

news.title: What is going on at India’s HDFC Bank?
news.india_relevance: As India's largest private lender, HDFC Bank's post-merger struggles affect the entire banking sector and institutional investor sentiment.
news.why_it_matters: The analysis explores the structural challenges of integrating a massive mortgage lender and the resulting pressure on deposit growth.

news.title: The private credit boom has a problem
news.india_relevance: Explains the risks in India's rapidly growing alternative investment space where high-yield lending often bypasses traditional banking safeguards.
news.why_it_matters: It breaks down the 'evergreening' risks where new loans are used to hide defaults, a critical warning for sophisticated Indian investors.

news.title: Campbell Wilson steps down as Air India CEO - Reports
news.india_relevance: A leadership vacuum at the top of the Tata-owned carrier complicates the most ambitious airline turnaround in Indian history.
news.why_it_matters: The resignation comes during a critical merger phase with Vistara, potentially delaying operational integration and fleet expansion plans.

news.title: LPG crisis fuels labour crunch, industry's hiring cost up 15%
news.india_relevance: Connects energy supply chain disruptions directly to the rising operational costs for Indian MSMEs and industrial hubs.
news.why_it_matters: It illustrates the second-order effect of the West Asia war on migrant labour availability and domestic manufacturing competitiveness.

news.title: Brazil, India, Vietnam, and Russia hold large reserves of rare earth, but mine very little of them
news.india_relevance: Highlights India's untapped potential in the global green energy supply chain and the policy gap in critical mineral extraction.
news.why_it_matters: India's reliance on imports for EV and electronics components remains a strategic vulnerability despite having significant raw reserves.

news.title: India's smartphone market hit by massive price hikes: Vivo, Samsung, Oppo rates jump up to 40%.

news.why_it_matters: Steep price hikes in the budget and mid-range segments could significantly dampen the digital adoption curve and rural demand.

news.title: Tata Trusts row deepens as vice-chairmen allege concealment, forced resignation

rankings.title: Rules allowing inclusion of contiguous mining area notified
rankings.india_relevance: A technical policy change that simplifies the expansion of existing mines in India.
rankings.why_it_matters: This reduces bureaucratic hurdles for mining companies, potentially boosting domestic production of coal and minerals.

rankings.title: Google’s biggest data centre outside US: Construction to start on April 28 in Andhra Pradesh
rankings.india_relevance: A massive infrastructure investment that cements India's position as a global hub for AI and data processing.
rankings.why_it_matters: The scale of this project will drive local demand for green energy and high-skilled tech labor in the region.

rankings.title: D2C brands face longer wait, higher costs to enter quick commerce as monetisation tightens
rankings.india_relevance: Analyzes the shifting power dynamic between Indian D2C brands and platforms like Blinkit and Zepto.
rankings.why_it_matters: As quick commerce platforms prioritize their own margins, the 'easy growth' era for small D2C brands is ending.

rankings.title: Wipro bags $1 b Olam deal, buys IT arm Mindsprint for $375 m
rankings.india_relevance: A significant acquisition by an Indian IT major to bolster its domain expertise in the food and agriculture vertical.
rankings.why_it_matters: This move signals Wipro's strategy to move away from generic IT services toward high-value, industry-specific consulting.

rankings.title: Vedanta, HZL, others likely to participate in pre-bid meet for Rs 7,280-crore rare earth magnet scheme
rankings.india_relevance: India's attempt to build a domestic ecosystem for high-end magnets used in EVs and defense.
rankings.why_it_matters: Success in this PLI-style scheme would reduce India's total dependence on China for critical green-tech components.

rankings.title: India's food systems need a reset for Viksit Bharat, rethink policy focus
rankings.india_relevance: A critical look at how India's agricultural policy must evolve from 'food security' to 'nutritional security' and sustainability.
rankings.why_it_matters: The piece argues that current subsidy structures are outdated and hinder the transition to high-value, climate-resilient farming.

rankings.title: India’s outreach to Angola will contain energy risk
rankings.india_relevance: Details India's diplomatic and commercial strategy to diversify its oil imports away from the volatile Middle East.
rankings.why_it_matters: Energy security is the primary driver of India's foreign policy; securing African crude is a vital hedge against the Hormuz crisis.

rankings.title: IEX volumes jump 17% to all-time high; spot prices soften despite demand uptick - The Financial Express
rankings.india_relevance: Explains the counter-intuitive price behavior in India's short-term power market during a period of high demand.
rankings.why_it_matters: It highlights the increasing maturity of India's power exchange and the impact of improved coal supply on spot electricity rates.

rankings.title: Part of state capex loan tied to fiscal discipline
rankings.india_relevance: Central policy shaping state government spending behaviour.
rankings.why_it_matters: Explains how the Centre is using financial incentives to enforce fiscal prudence among states, affecting infrastructure spending quality.

rankings.title: India’s outreach to Angola will contain energy risk
rankings.india_relevance: Details India's diplomatic effort to diversify oil supplies.
rankings.why_it_matters: Highlights a strategic move to reduce dependence on the volatile Gulf region by building ties with an African oil producer.

rankings.title: TRAI releases consultation paper on regulatory framework for FAST channels
rankings.india_relevance: Regulatory move impacting India's evolving free TV streaming sector.
rankings.why_it_matters: Begins process to shape rules for free ad-supported streaming, affecting broadcasters, platforms, and advertising markets.
